hero_subtitle: Certified arborists specializing in tree preservation, removal, and plant health care across the western suburbs.
service_area_description: Serving Elmhurst, Oak Park, Lombard, Downers Grove, Wheaton, Naperville & the western suburbs.
seo_title: Chicagoland Tree Preservation | Tree Care Experts in Elmhurst, IL
seo_description: Chicagoland Tree Preservation — certified arborists offering tree preservation, removal, pruning, and plant health care in Elmhurst and the western suburbs.
services_subtitle: Science-driven tree care that keeps your landscape healthy and your property safe.
reviews_subtitle: Homeowners and municipalities across the western suburbs rely on our preservation-first approach.
cta_heading: Don't wait until the next storm decides for you.
cta_subtitle: Schedule a free arborist consultation and get a detailed care plan within 48 hours.
footer_description: Certified arborists dedicated to preserving Chicagoland's urban tree canopy.

services_featured.name: Tree Preservation
services_featured.description: Proactive care plans to protect mature trees from disease, construction damage, and environmental stress.

services_featured.name: Tree Removal
services_featured.description: Safe, controlled removal when a tree can't be saved — minimizing impact to your landscape.

services_secondary.name: Plant Health Care
services_secondary.description: Targeted treatments for disease, insect infestations, and nutrient deficiencies.

services_secondary.name: Stump Grinding
services_secondary.description: Complete stump removal to reclaim usable yard space and prevent regrowth.

services_accent.name: Emergency Storm Response
services_accent.description: Rapid response for storm-damaged trees threatening your home or property.

services_wide.name: Pruning & Canopy Management
services_wide.description: Structural pruning that promotes long-term health, clearance, and aesthetic form.

about_features.title: Preservation-First Philosophy
about_features.description: We exhaust every option to save a tree before recommending removal — because mature trees are irreplaceable.

about_features.title: ISA Certified Arborists
about_features.description: Our team holds International Society of Arboriculture credentials and stays current on best practices.

about_features.title: Deep Suburban Roots
about_features.description: Locally owned and operated in Elmhurst, serving the communities we live in.

reviews.name: Laura K.
reviews.text: They saved our 80-year-old elm that two other companies said had to come down. True preservation experts.

reviews.name: Tom H.
reviews.text: Professional from estimate to cleanup. Their plant health care program brought our maples back to life.

reviews.name: Rita P.
reviews.text: After a bad storm they were out the next morning. Removed a split oak safely and left our yard spotless.
